flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Union Adventist University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (439 vs 597).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Union Adventist University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (574 → 471).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Union Adventist University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (59.9% → 52.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Union Adventist University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.1k → $29.3k).
